final:
module clock_divider (
    input clk,         // Input clock
    output reg clk_out // Divided clock output
);
    reg [1:0] unused_count; // 2-bit counter

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        unused_count <= unused_count + 1; // Increment unused_count on each clock edge
        if (unused_count == 3) begin
            clk_out <= ~clk_out; // Toggle output clock every 4 cycles
            unused_count <= 0; // Reset unused_count
        end
    end

    initial begin
        clk_out = 0; // Initialize output clock
        unused_count = 0; // Initialize counter
    end
endmodule
